name: Fettucine Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion in a skillet.
2. Stir in tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper.
3. Bring to a boil. Simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and add mozzarella and 1/4 cup Parmesan. Let stand 9-12 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, cook the fettucini.
6. Beat eggs, stir in remaining Parmesan, butter, parsley, and garlic powder.
7. Stir into hot noodles.
8. Spoon onto tomato mixture. Cover.
9. Cook over low heat for 15 minutes or until set.
10. Let stand 5 minutes.
11. Turn out on a round platter.
